_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: Microsatellite and SNP sequencing analysis revealed that loss of heterozygosity was a common event in tumors isolated from Nf1+/− mutant mice...LOH of Nf1 was accompanied by LOH of at least one of the microsatellites in 87% percent of all tumors
details: Loss of heterozygosity (LOH) was a common event in tumors, with LOH of Nf1 accompanied by LOH of at least one microsatellite in 87% of all tumors. LOH commonly involved loss of chromosomal segment spanning Nf1 and Trp53
